title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Unisys India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Unisys India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Unisys India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
